DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.1: (TBD)Alignment conditions not ready Vehicle moving(or vehicle speednot equal0km/h)(01h)
lists.2: (TBD)Alignment conditions not ready System Failure detected(02h)
